svg.text: py-spy record --format flamegraph -o benchmark/results/html/svg/locust_2026-06-24_17-19-13_jobs-10000000_nodes-50000_cc-500_u-100_r-50_t-15m_w-5_flamegraph.svg --subprocesses -- locust -f benchmark/locustfile.py --num-jobs 10000000 --num-nodes 50000 --candidates-count 500 --master --headless -u 100 -r 50 -t 15m --log-level ERROR --csv benchmark/results/locust_2026-06-24_17-19-13_jobs-10000000_nodes-50000_cc-500_u-100_r-50_t-15m_w-5 --csv-full-history --html benchmark/results/html/locust_2026-06-24_17-19-13_jobs-10000000_nodes-50000_cc-500_u-100_r-50_t-15m_w-5.html
